com.saperion.common.logging.LogLevel

Package
Description
com.saperion.common.logging
Contains standard logging classes.

  • Uses of LogLevel in com.saperion.common.logging

    Methods in com.saperion.common.logging that return LogLevel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static LogLevel
    LogLevel.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static LogLevel[]
    LogLevel.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Logger.isLogLevelEnabled(LogLevel logLevel)
    Returns whether the logger is enabled for the specified LogLevel.
    void
    Logger.log(LogLevel logLevel, String message)
    Logs a message at the specified LogLevel.
    void
    Logger.log(LogLevel logLevel, String message, String parameterName, Object parameterValue)
    Logs a message with a parameter in a standard format at the specified LogLevel.
    void

    Logs a message with 2 parameters in a standard format at the specified LogLevel.

    Logs a message with 3 parameters in a standard format at the specified LogLevel.

    Logs a message with 10 parameters in a standard format at the specified LogLevel.
    void
    Logger.log(LogLevel logLevel, String message, Throwable throwable)
    Logs a Throwable completely with its stack trace with an accompanying message at the specified LogLevel.
